# Implement Workflow Lifecycle

## Purpose

Use when modeling explicit workflow definitions, runs, tasks, and transition APIs with Django persistence and JSON endpoints.

## Steps

1. Model definitions, runs, and tasks as persistent Django models.
2. Expose create/list/detail/transition endpoints under /api/v1/workflows.
3. Apply role checks and tenant-scoped task visibility rules.
